case_title: CHIEF,DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. GEORGE PAPAFILIS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF,DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNISURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFOR NIA AS TO DEFENDANT PAPAFILIS, GEORGE EACH INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY DBA MYCONOS RESTAURANT LOUKOPOULOS, AGATHA EACH INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY DBA MYCONOS RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF,DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNISURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFOR NIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAPAFILIS, GEORGE EACH INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY DBA MYCONOS RESTAURANT LOUKOPOULOS, AGATHA EACH INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY DBA MYCONOS RESTAURANT $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
